dict.string: Project 2501 plugins may use automation to control other applications on your behalf.
Project 2501 plugins may access your calendar to read and create events.
Project 2501 plugins may access your calendar to read and create events.
Project 2501 plugins may access your contacts to search and read contact information.
Project 2501 plugins may access your reminders to read and create tasks.
Project 2501 plugins may access your location to provide location-based services.
Project 2501 plugins may access your location to provide location-based services.
Project 2501 uses the microphone for on-device voice transcription with FluidAudio.
Project 2501 can capture system audio for transcription. Screen content is not recorded.
Project 2501 uses the local network to discover and connect to agents running on other devices.
